errors.insufficientData: Not enough history to calculate 14-day ATR

holdingPainCalculator.title: Holding Pain Index
holdingPainCalculator.description: Enter an A-share, HK stock, or index to compute the 6-month holding pain index from daily bars.
holdingPainCalculator.formulaHint: Pain = (down days ÷ trading days) × (avg down move ÷ avg up move) × (max down streak ÷ 5)

errors.queryRequired: Enter a stock or index ticker/name
errors.notFound: No match found; pick from the dropdown
errors.multipleMatches: Multiple matches; pick from the dropdown
errors.insufficientData: Not enough trading days in the past 6 months

pegPaybackCalculator.paybackInterpretation: At {growth}% annual growth, about {years} years of cumulative profit cover market cap.

scenarioErrors.non_positive_growth: Growth must be positive to compute PEG
scenarioErrors.insufficient_quarters_for_ttm_growth: Need 8+ quarters for TTM YoY core profit growth
scenarioErrors.missing_parent_net_profit: Parent net profit quarterly data not found
scenarioErrors.missing_deducted_net_profit: Core net profit quarterly data not found
scenarioErrors.missing_deducted_growth: Core profit growth missing; cannot compute PEG
scenarioErrors.missing_hk_non_ifrs_operating_profit: HK normal operating profit (5034-5032) quarterly data not found
scenarioErrors.missing_hk_non_ifrs_growth: Normal operating profit growth missing; cannot compute PEG
scenarioErrors.opend_unsupported: OpenD version too old or financial API unsupported
scenarioErrors.unknown: Data error, please try again later

errors.invalidGrowth: Enter a valid positive profit growth rate (%)
errors.invalidPe: Could not derive a valid PE
errors.invalidProfitInputs: Market cap and TTM profit must be positive
errors.paybackUnavailable: Payback unavailable (negative profit, growth too low, or never pays back)

breadth.trendDesc: Share of stocks above MA20 in this industry over the last 30 sessions
breadth.thresholdHint: When market breadth approaches or exceeds a specific threshold (e.g., 85%), it may signal a cyclical peak; when it nears or falls below another threshold (e.g., 15%), it may signal a cyclical bottom.

errors.noDataAvailable: No data available for selected date

briefing.pageSubtitle: From 9:00 to 16:00, your agent publishes an hourly digest so you can catch the day's market narrative faster.
briefing.disclaimer: The content follow is for reference only and does not constitute investment advice. Investing involves risk; decisions should be made prudently.

briefing.empty: No briefing has been published yet
briefing.historyEnd: You've reached the end of history
briefing.noIssueYet: This slot is not published yet. Stay tuned.
briefing.subscribeSubtitle: Get high-density intraday signals without the noise.
briefing.value1Desc: A fresh digest every hour during market hours.
briefing.value2Desc: Each note includes a thesis and verifiable clues.
briefing.value3Desc: Highlights opportunities and risks for faster action.
briefing.marketOpenHint: Market session is active. New issues will continue each hour.
briefing.marketClosedHint: Outside market hours. Publishing resumes tomorrow at 9:00.
